testCases.title: Verify that system validates mandatory Hiring Manager field when creating a job vacancy

steps.expected: Configured credentials should be entered successfully

steps.action: Enter Job Title "DevOps Engineer", Vacancy Name "DO-2024-001", leave Hiring Manager unselected, and enter Number of Positions "2"
steps.expected: Hiring Manager field should remain empty

steps.action: Click Save button and verify validation error is displayed
steps.expected: System should display required field validation error for Hiring Manager
